subject: It is live. You can invest in FarmThru now.
preheader: The equity crowdfunding campaign is open on Birchal. Here is how to invest.
body:
The campaign is live.

FarmThru's equity crowdfunding raise is now open on Birchal. You can invest today.

Over the past few weeks you have seen the food. You have met the farms. You have heard how the model works: regenerative farms across NSW, direct to our Brookvale hub, collected fresh by families. No middlemen. No mystery about provenance.

Now you can own a piece of it.

How to invest: click the link below to visit our campaign page on Birchal. Read the disclosure document first. It covers our financials, our risks, our team, and exactly how the funds will be used. If you are comfortable, you can invest from $50 up to $10,000.

If you are a VIP member, you already have priority access. The campaign opens to the general waitlist shortly after.

A note on risk. Investing in early-stage businesses means you could lose some or all of your investment. This is not financial advice. Consider seeking independent financial advice before making any investment decision. Full details in the disclosure document on Birchal.

Thank you for being here from the start.

Rachel & the FarmThru team
creative_brief: Launch day email. High energy but grounded. Bold 'We are live' header. Key model summary as a visual strip (farm to hub to family). Single prominent CTA to Birchal campaign page. Birchal badge. Compliance clearly formatted. This is the most important email in the sequence.
